cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is about how the author introduces the topic. The article starts with a question: "Do you start your work by making a list..." followed by several more questions. Then it goes into the benefits of making to-do lists. The options are A) asking a series of questions, B) presenting some simple facts, C) stating his own point of view, D) listing the benefits. So the first part of the text is definitely a series of questions. The author is using those questions to engage the reader
